file_summary: README.md provides an overview of 'lup', an AI-powered code documentation tool, explaining its functionality, installation methods, configuration options, supported languages, and editor integrations.

symbols.name: lines_1_40
symbols.summary: Introduces 'lup', an AI-powered code documentation tool that summarizes source files using tree-sitter, LLM, and sqlite-vec for local semantic lookups.

symbols.name: lines_36_75
symbols.summary: Provides instructions for downloading and running 'lup' manually using shell scripts and PowerShell commands.

symbols.name: lines_71_110
symbols.summary: Describes various 'make' commands for building and installing 'lup', including cross-compilation.

symbols.name: lines_106_145
symbols.summary: Explains the configuration options for 'lup', including embedding models, API keys, and timeout settings.

symbols.name: lines_141_180
symbols.summary: Lists commands for re-embedding summaries, showing configuration, status of summarised files, and project storage details.

symbols.name: lines_176_207
symbols.signature: Committing `.lup/summaries/` is optional but useful if you want to share pre-generated documentation with your team.
symbols.summary: Discusses the option to commit generated summaries for sharing and lists supported languages and editor integrations.
